name: Order Quantity Limits
body: [{"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/OrderCustomFields1.05T5g00000jGEjMEAW.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/OrderCustomFields1.05T5g00000jGEjMEAW.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "User-added image"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "This add-on was built by Maropost"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Add-ons and Integrations built in-house by Maropost are documented and supported by our customer service team. If you're having issues with this integration, "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://www.netohq.com/support/s/ask-us", "children": [{"text": "let us know"}]}, {"text": "!"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Overview"}], "data-id": "0"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Order limits fields will be added to the "}, {"text": "Pricing & Tax", "bold": true}, {"text": " section of each product in the control panel:"}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/OrderQuantityLimits2.05T5g00000jG9HEEA0.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/OrderQuantityLimits2.05T5g00000jG9HEEA0.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can set the minimum and maximum number of this product that the customer can purchase in a single order. Customers won't be able to checkout with a quantity outside of the amounts your specify in a single order."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can also sell the product in bundles by entering a figure under "}, {"text": "Multi", "bold": true}, {"text": ". Customers will only be able to order in multiples of that number."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "If you want customers to only order in bundles over a certain initial quantity, enter that amount into the "}, {"text": "Start Multi ", "bold": true}, {"text": "field. They will still be able to buy any number of the product under the "}, {"text": "Start Multi", "bold": true}, {"text": " figure. However, when ordering over that amount the quantity order will need to be in multiples of the figure in the "}, {"text": "Multi", "bold": true}, {"text": " field."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Install the Order Quantity Limits Add-on"}], "data-id": "1"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To install the add-on:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel navigate to the "}, {"text": "Addons", "bold": true}, {"text": " menu."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In the order management section, find the "}, {"text": "Order Quantity Limits", "bold": true}, {"text": " add-on and click the "}, {"text": "Install", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Confirm by clicking the "}, {"text": "Install", "bold": true}, {"text": " button in the pop-up that appears."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Once installed the min, max, mult and start mult fields will appear on all products in your control panel."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Sell in Multiples, Lots or Batches"}], "data-id": "2"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To sell products in lots (e.g. 12 to a case):"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel navigate to "}, {"text": "Products", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "View Products", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click on the product you wish to edit."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Pricing & Tax", "bold": true}, {"text": " tab. In this section you will see a field labelled "}, {"text": "Mult", "bold": true}, {"text": ". This is where you define your multiplier quantity."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/OrderQuantityLimits3.05T5g00000jGEjgEAG.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/OrderQuantityLimits3.05T5g00000jGEjgEAG.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "It's also possible to define a multiplier quantity for a product based on user group, click on the \"Show all\" button to reveal the fields for all user groups in the system. This requires the "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/693-customer-groups", "children": [{"text": "Customer Groups"}]}, {"text": " add-on."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Add Order Limits Per Product"}], "data-id": "3"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can limit how much a customer can buy in a single order, on a product by product basis. Order limits can be added individually or in bulk:"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Individually"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel navigate to "}, {"text": "Products", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "View Products", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/OrderQuantityLimits4.05T5g00000jGCr6EAG.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/OrderQuantityLimits4.05T5g00000jGCr6EAG.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Select a product by clicking the "}, {"text": "SKU", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/OrderQuantityLimits5.05T5g00000jGEkoEAG.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/OrderQuantityLimits5.05T5g00000jGEkoEAG.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In the "}, {"text": "Pricing & Tax", "bold": true}, {"text": " section you will find "}, {"text": "Min", "bold": true}, {"text": " and "}, {"text": "Max", "bold": true}, {"text": " fields, which is where you enter your minimum or maximum quantities for the product."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/OrderQuantityLimits6.05T5g00000jGDbYEAW.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/OrderQuantityLimits6.05T5g00000jGDbYEAW.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Min/max quantities can also vary depending on the user group. To define these, click on the "}, {"text": "Show All", "bold": true}, {"text": " button to reveal the fields for all user groups."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "In Bulk"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Order limits can be added to products in bulk by using the "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/668-product-import-wizard#complex-import", "children": [{"text": "Complex Import Wizard"}]}, {"text": ", and the field "}, {"text": "Min Order Qty List (User Group)", "bold": true}, {"text": ". The format for this import field looks like this:"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "user_group:min_qty;multiplier_qty;max_qty,", "code": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "In the example below, customer group A can purchase a minimum of 5, in multiples of 5, up to a maximum of 25, while customer group B can purchase a minimum of 10, in multiples of 5, up to a maximum of 50."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "1:5;5;25,2:10;5;50,", "code": true}]}]
